name: 3 (Fighter) Squadron
location_description: Deploying to Romania for NATO Air Policing mission (Operation Biloxi 2026), Eastern Sentry vigilance activity on NATO's eastern flank
confidence_rationale: Asset is 3 (Fighter) Squadron deploying to Romania for a NATO Air Policing mission. Romania hosts NATO enhanced Air Policing at Mihail Kogălniceanu Air Base (near Constanța) and Câmpia Turzii (Cluj area). Mihail Kogălniceanu (LRCK, ~44.36°N, 28.49°E) is the primary NATO air policing hub on Romania's Black Sea flank, but Câmpia Turzii (LRTC, ~46.79°N, 23.89°E) has also hosted UK fast jet deployments. 'Operation Biloxi 2026' and 'Eastern Sentry' are not confirmed open-source designations, suggesting a fictional/exercise scenario. Coordinates provided are centred on Romania generally (Bucharest area) as a country-level estimate given ambiguity between the two candidate bases. Confidence is moderate — Romania is confirmed but the specific airfield is uncertain.
